resolutionOptions.reshipOption: Expedited (2-day) reship available — Premium Member benefit
resolutionOptions.storeCredit: Available as alternative — 110% of order value

resolutionOptions.premiumBenefits: Premium Members receive expedited reship at no charge and priority investigation handling

policy:
LOST/UNDELIVERED PACKAGE POLICY — Premium Member

When tracking shows "Delivered" but the customer disputes receipt:
  • Carrier investigation must be opened before final resolution
  • Investigation does NOT need to complete before offering replacement or refund

Premium Member Resolution Options
  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  Expedited Replacement Reship:   FREE (2-day)         │
  │  Standard Replacement Reship:    FREE (5-7 day)       │
  │  Full Refund:                    Available            │
  │  Store Credit:                   110% of order value  │
  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Guidance
  • If the customer has time-sensitive need (e.g., travel), recommend Expedited Replacement Reship
  • Refund is appropriate if the customer no longer wants the item
  • Carrier investigation proceeds in parallel regardless of resolution chosen

prompt.text: Ask the customer for their customer ID or order number to verify identity before discussing account details.
Review the order — items purchased, total, and shipping address — before checking tracking.
Review the delivery timeline and scan details. Note that 'Delivered' does not match the customer's report.
Review GPS/driver evidence, then submit a lost package investigation with the carrier.
Review eligible resolution options and select the best one given the customer's situation.
Confirm the chosen resolution and issue the applicable confirmation numbers.
Return to the customer tab and deliver the resolution and next steps below.

lookup.searchPlaceholder: Enter customer ID or order number...

investigation.correctMessage: Investigation submitted to carrier. Reference logged — this runs in parallel and does not block resolution.

resolution.correctMessage: Correct. Premium Members are eligible for a free expedited (2-day) replacement reship — the fastest path given the customer's timeline.

items: Acknowledge the frustration of a 'Delivered' package that never arrived
Explain that a carrier investigation has been opened
Confirm the expedited replacement reship and its 2-day delivery window
Mention the refund/store credit alternatives were considered
Confirm the replacement will arrive before the customer's trip
Provide the case number and confirm the email confirmation was sent

communicate.resolution: Expedited replacement reship issued. Carrier investigation opened. Confirmation email sent.
